title: Vectorized Clip-Cov policy loss (avoid CPU sync)
summary: Moved Clip-Cov token selection fully onto the GPU to remove torch.nonzero and randperm synchronization points.

representative_shapes: clip-cov policy loss on representative PPO batches

success_gate: Keep Clip-Cov selection semantics on CUDA while removing avoidable CPU synchronization.

results.note: Replaces torch.nonzero+randperm (CPU sync) with GPU-side topk on random priorities. Covariance band selection stays fully on GPU.

notes: Normalized from the legacy task-card schema on 2026-04-03 to restore queue validation.
